questions.scope_label: G1: Alignment with relevant EU regulations (CSRD, ESRS, EED, ESPR, WEEE, LCA, ISO14040, ISO14044)
questions.question: To what extent is the RI aligned with relevant EU environmental regulations such as CSRD, ESRS, EED, ESPR, WEEE, LCA, ISO14040, ISO14044?
questions.reference: CSRD, ESRS E1-E5,  ESPR, EED, WEEE, LCA, ISO14040, ISO14044

questions.scope_label: G1: Alignment with relevant EU regulations (CSRD, ESRS, EED, ESPR, WEEE, LCA, ISO14040, ISO14044)
questions.question: Has the RI conducted a review or gap analysis to identify which regulations apply and how they are addressed?

questions.scope_label: G2: Existence of a formal environmental sustainability strategy
questions.question: Is there a documented environmental sustainability strategy in place, endorsed by leadership and periodically updated?

questions.scope_label: G3: Defined roles and responsibilities for sustainability
questions.question: Are roles and responsibilities for environmental sustainability clearly assigned across relevant functions within the RI?

questions.scope_label: G4: Inclusion of sustainability in internal policies or quality systems
questions.question: To what extent is environmental sustainability integrated into the RI’s internal policies, management systems, or quality frameworks?

questions.scope_label: G5: Inclusion of sustainability in procurement or supplier management
questions.question: Does the RI include environmental sustainability criteria in procurement processes and supplier evaluations?
questions.associated_metric: % of suppliers evaluated with environmental criteria (optional)
questions.reference: ISO 20400, ESRS G1, ESRS E5, EU Green Public Procurement Guidelines

questions.scope_label: S1: Sustainability awareness/training for staff
questions.question: To what extent does the RI provide staff training or awareness programmes on environmental sustainability topics relevant to their roles?
questions.associated_metric: % of staff trained annually, number of training sessions

questions.scope_label: S2: Involvement of stakeholders in environmental planning
questions.question: Are relevant stakeholders (e.g. users, suppliers, partners) engaged in environmental planning or sustainability goal-setting processes?

questions.scope_label: S3: Transparent communication of environmental performance
questions.question: Does the RI regularly communicate its environmental performance, actions, or goals to internal and external stakeholders?
questions.associated_metric: Frequency and scope of communications (e.g., reports/year)

questions.scope_label: E1: Adoption of renewable energy sources
questions.question: What proportion of the RI’s energy consumption is sourced from renewable energy, and how is this verified?
questions.reference: ISO 50001, ESRS E1, EU Renewable Energy Directive

questions.scope_label: E2: AI-driven workload or energy optimisation
questions.question: Are AI or automation systems used to optimise energy consumption across compute, cooling, or other infrastructure components?

questions.scope_label: E3: Waste heat recovery or reuse strategies
questions.question: Does the RI implement strategies to recover or reuse waste heat generated by infrastructure?
questions.associated_metric: Energy reuse factor (ERF), % of recovered heat reused

questions.scope_label: E4: Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE) tracking and optimisation
questions.question: Is the RI’s PUE monitored regularly, and are efforts in place to optimise it over time?
questions.reference: ISO/IEC 30134-2, EN 50600-4-2, EU CoC on Data Centre Energy Efficiency

questions.scope_label: E5: Carbon Use Effectiveness (CUE) tracking and reduction
questions.question: Is CUE calculated and used as a metric for assessing carbon performance of the RI’s operations?

questions.scope_label: E6: Flexible energy usage or smart grid responsiveness
questions.question: Does the RI participate in energy flexibility initiatives, such as demand response or smart grid integration?
questions.associated_metric: Participation in flexibility programs; % load modulated during events
questions.reference: EU Electricity Directive, EN 50600-4-7 (Availability and resilience), Smart Grid Task Force reports

questions.scope_label: M1: Measurement of environmental KPIs (GHG, energy, water, waste)
questions.question: Which environmental KPIs (e.g. GHG emissions, energy, water, waste) are currently measured and how frequently are they reported?
questions.associated_metric: Number and frequency of reported environmental KPIs
questions.reference: ISO 14031, ESRS E1–E5, GHG Protocol, ISO 14064

questions.scope_label: M2: Use of environmental metrics in planning and reporting
questions.question: To what extent are environmental metrics integrated into the RI’s strategic planning or operational decision-making?
questions.associated_metric: Number of decisions/plans referencing environmental KPIs (optional, qualitative)

questions.scope_label: M3: Lifecycle-based environmental impact assessment (based on LCA methodology)
questions.question: Has the RI conducted or applied lifecycle assessments (LCA) to evaluate its environmental impact across different phases, including monitoring of Global Warming Potential (GWP) and Cumulative Energy Demand (CED)?
questions.associated_metric: Number or coverage of LCA studies conducted

questions.scope_label: M4: Use of WUE (Water Usage Effectiveness) or similar water metrics
questions.question: Is WUE or any comparable metric tracked and used to assess the RI’s water efficiency performance?

questions.scope_label: M5: Implementation of monitoring tools/platforms
questions.question: Are dedicated tools or platforms in place for tracking, visualising, or reporting environmental performance?

questions.scope_label: P1: Reduction of operational waste (incl. e-waste)
questions.question: Are practices in place to reduce operational waste generation, including e-waste from IT systems and equipment?
questions.associated_metric: Volume of e-waste or operational waste per year
questions.reference: WEEE Directive, ISO 14001, EU Circular Economy Action Plan

questions.scope_label: P2: End-of-life management for equipment
questions.question: Does the RI apply defined procedures for the reuse, recycling, or proper disposal of decommissioned equipment?

questions.scope_label: P3: Circular IT practices (reuse, remanufacturing, modularity)
questions.question: Are circular IT principles such as reuse, modularity, or refurbishment applied in procurement or infrastructure management?
questions.associated_metric: % of IT purchases meeting circularity criteria
questions.reference: EU Circular Economy Action Plan, ISO 20400 (Sustainable Procurement)

questions.scope_label: P4: Pollution control (air, water, soil)
questions.question: Are measures in place to monitor and manage pollution risks related to air, water, or soil emissions from RI operations?
questions.associated_metric: Presence and scope of pollution monitoring and control measures
questions.reference: ISO 14001, EU Industrial Emissions Directive, ESRS E2

questions.scope_label: P5: Use of low-impact or non-toxic materials
questions.question: Are environmental criteria applied when selecting materials or products, with preference for low-impact or non-toxic options?
questions.associated_metric: % of materials/products procured meeting low-impact criteria
questions.reference: ESPR (Ecodesign), EU Green Public Procurement Criteria, ISO 14024

questions.scope_label: W1: Water usage monitoring and reduction strategies
questions.question: To what extent does the RI monitor its water consumption and implement strategies to reduce it?

questions.scope_label: W2: Impact on local ecosystems or biodiversity
questions.question: Does the RI assess and manage its potential impacts on local ecosystems or biodiversity, particularly for physical infrastructure?
questions.reference: EU Biodiversity Strategy, ISO 14001, ESRS E4

questions.scope_label: W3: Rainwater harvesting, reuse, or runoff management
questions.question: Are there systems or practices in place for rainwater harvesting, water reuse, or managing stormwater runoff?

questions.scope_label: W4: Water-based cooling systems and water efficiency strategies
questions.question: Does the RI use water-based cooling systems, and are measures in place to optimise their water efficiency and minimise environmental impact?
questions.associated_metric: Water Usage Effectiveness (WUE), annual water withdrawal for cooling
questions.reference: ISO 30134-9, ESRS E3, EU CoC for Data Centres

questions.scope_label: L1: Sustainability embedded in the design phase
questions.question: To what extent are sustainability considerations integrated into the design and planning of new infrastructure or services?
questions.reference: ISO 14006, ESRS E1, ESPR, EU Taxonomy (Substantial Contribution Criteria)

questions.scope_label: L2: Consideration of sustainability during implementation
questions.question: Are sustainability criteria applied during the implementation or deployment of infrastructure components and systems?

questions.scope_label: L3: Operational sustainability practices
questions.question: What sustainability practices are in place for the operation and maintenance of the RI’s infrastructure and services?

questions.scope_label: L4: Decommissioning/termination phase planning
questions.question: Does the RI include environmental considerations in its decommissioning or termination plans for infrastructure or services?

placeholder_string_mismatch.description: Workbook uses multiple visually similar placeholder values, which can break equality checks when ported.

formula_reference_anomalies.issue: Uses D12="No" instead of C12="No" for scope check.
Uses D25="No" instead of C25="No" for scope check.
Uses D30="No" instead of C30="No" for scope check.
Uses P105=2 in nested IF for L2.1 instead of P102=2.

issues.xlookup_modern_excel: XLOOKUP, FILTER, UNIQUE, LET are used. Reimplement in app logic rather than relying on workbook calc.
